name: list-stream
title: List with stream/append shape (chat-list and similar)
description: Pattern for rendering a list whose items arrive over time and append at the end (chat messages, activity feed, log stream). Distinct from a finite-list pattern: optimistic-update + scroll-anchor + new-items-since-last-read are first-class concerns. Pure pattern entry — no component source.

cena.whenToUse: List rendering where (a) items arrive incrementally, (b) the natural reading order is oldest→newest with newest at the bottom, and (c) optimistic updates are common (user sends a message, it appears immediately, then the server confirms). Primary use case: Care-team messages thread.

loadBearingProperties.name: renderingMode
loadBearingProperties.guidance: Default to @for unless the list is genuinely long (>100 items typically). Virtual scroll adds complexity that's only worth paying for long lists.

loadBearingProperties.name: scrollAnchor
loadBearingProperties.guidance: Chat-list defaults to bottom-on-new (auto-scroll when a new item arrives AND the user is already near the bottom). Use IntersectionObserver to detect 'near the bottom' rather than scroll-position math.

loadBearingProperties.name: optimisticUpdate
loadBearingProperties.guidance: For Messages: optimistic-with-pending-flag. Show the message immediately with a 'sending' indicator; replace with server-confirmed item on response. Roll back only on hard failure (network or permission).

gotchas: Always use a stable track-by key (track msg.id), not the array index — required for optimistic updates to swap the pending item with the server-confirmed one without re-rendering the whole list
Scroll anchor logic should run in afterNextRender, not in a constructor effect — the DOM has to exist before measurements are valid
Optimistic items need a way to be uniquely identified BEFORE server confirms an id. Generate a client-side temp id (crypto.randomUUID()) and reconcile when the server responds.
Don't put scroll-position-tracking logic in the same effect that mutates messages — under zoneless, that creates the auto-trigger loop the cd-zoneless pattern warns about

preferenceLedgerRows.name: signal input()/output() I/O
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: messages/pendingIds are signals; onSend emits output

preferenceLedgerRows.name: Data Connect contract shape
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: messages list binds to getMessages() from dataconnect.service — see data-connect-binding (deferred)

references: Andrey's anchor: cena-health-spark/patients/src/app/care-team/messages/messages.component.ts + compose-bar.component.ts (real Messages implementation in his tree)
In-catalog cross-reference: cd-zoneless (the auto-trigger loop warning)
cena.ownership: Cena-authored 2026-05-28 — no upstream lineage; references Andrey's existing implementation as the shape anchor
